'''''Renthal's Vigilance''''' was a [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] in [[Drea Renthal]]'s [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] fleet. Originally it had been an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship named '''''Vigilance''''' under [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Darv Eldon]].

It was part of the Imperial [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] present at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]] in [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]]. When the ''Vigilance'' entered the debris field surrounding the moon, it was ambushed by ships of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]' [[First Strike Element]]. After a fierce engagement with the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] ship ''[[Dragon Pearl]]'' commanded by [[Mako Spince]], ''Vigilance'' became damaged to the extent that the shields on the port side went down and the lasers started to score hits on the hull. The pirate ships ''[[Too Late Now]]'' and ''[[Minestra]]'' came in to finish it off, leaving the ''Vigilance'' a crippled wreck in space and Captain Eldon dead.

Before the ''Vigilance'' was defeated, it destroyed ''[[Take That!]]'' and ''[[Bnef Nlle]]'', though the latter ship weakened the ''Vigilance''{{'s}} port shields in a ramming attack. After the battle, it was salvaged by the pirate leader Renthal. She renamed her new acquisition the ''Renthal's Vigilance'', turning it into her [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] and the largest ship in her [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

The ship's size and power came in handy in subsequent raids, especially when Drea assaulted the ''[[Queen of Empire]]'' by tugging a massive asteroid into place and knocking the luxury liner out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
